name: Fore Score Gate Parkway
about: Fore Score Golf Tavern operates two locations in Jacksonville, Florida (San Marco and Gate Parkway), offering a combination of golf simulation, food, and drink under one roof. The venue features Full Swing golf simulators, providing a platform for users to play virtual golf courses, practice their swing, or engage in competitive long drive challenges. It operates as a fast casual sports bar with a focus on being a local hangout, featuring events like trivia, live music, and league play alongside its golf offerings. Bays are reserved by the hour, and the facility caters to a range of activities from casual golf games to group outings and private events.
why_golfers_like_it: Industry-leading Full Swing simulator technology for high-quality practice and play
Ability to play on famous courses like Pebble Beach and challenge friends to long drive competitions
Convenient all-in-one location combining golf, food, and drink for a complete social experience

food_and_drink.notes: Elevated fast casual menu available at both San Marco and Gate Parkway locations
Full bar with an inviting atmosphere for hanging out

simulator_hardware.notes: Industry leader in simulator technology, with 4 simulators at San Marco and 6 at Gate Parkway locations

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, clubs and sporting equipment are provided for use, though you are welcome to bring your own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not allowed. The venue offers an elevated fast casual menu and a full bar.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It takes an average golfer roughly an hour and a half to play 18 holes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Fore Score Golf Tavern is designed as a family-friendly environment where people can make exciting memories over golf and games.
